observed_local_coverage: PatchedQwen3_5TextModel._compute_position_ids stitches stored multimodal prompt positions with a sequential tail when chunked prefill crosses the stored prompt boundary.
PatchedQwen3_5TextModel._compute_sequential_position_ids accepts scalar and vector cache offsets plus rope_deltas.
tests/test_patched_qwen3_5.py contains chunked-MRoPE, rope_deltas decode, fully-padded vision-row, and left-padded batch-cache coverage.
CacheWrapper._num_tokens_in_cache reads cache[0].offset when present and scans later cache entries when the first entry has no offset.
CacheWrapper._flush_live_cache and _prefill_cache use _num_tokens_in_cache before trimming or checkpointing.
convert_to_pil decodes base64 images and calls .convert("RGB").

branch_triage.head: 9aa3db2
branch_triage.reason: Same decision as M30. The branch is a Gemma4 tool-runtime and grammar-guard feature lane. The interesting optimization commits depend on that feature surface and do not form a retained Mac-local VLM prompt-cache latency candidate.

branch_triage.head: 7dfe3cd
branch_triage.reason: Same decision as M30. The branch remains a broad parallel VLM/image-cache architecture lane, not an isolated patch against the current local batched VLM prompt-cache implementation.

branch_triage.head: 161ff8f
branch_triage.reason: Stale test-only branch. The single ahead commit edits tests/test_vision_models.py, while the full branch diff would revert large current upstream VLM/cache surfaces. It has no runtime latency hypothesis for the retained lane.

branch_triage.head: ea1a6bb
branch_triage.reason: Same decision as M30. It is a large VLM parity/CI branch with overlapping cache and batching changes, not a bounded local performance candidate.

branch_triage.head: c8970c9
interesting_commits: c8970c9 Revert "[Mistral3] Send empty (instead of fake) input IDs (#196)"
branch_triage.reason: Stale Mistral3 branch on an upstream-only vision_add_ons surface. It is not LFM2.5-VL prompt-cache work and the full branch diff would revert current cache and VLM surfaces.

branch_triage.head: 1a141d6
branch_triage.reason: The commit is already an ancestor of upstream/main and local HEAD. The local image utility already converts decoded images to RGB.

branch_triage.head: 461015c
branch_triage.reason: Test-only commit on a stale and divergent branch. Local LFM2.5-VL work already has retained repeated-sample benchmark and restart-cache evidence; this adds no runtime patch or promotion candidate.

branch_triage.head: 2c265bc
branch_triage.reason: Debug branch containing dumps, disabled patches, and Qwen3.5 experimental work. It is not a clean candidate branch.

branch_triage.head: fc4d488
branch_triage.reason: Dump/debug branch. It intentionally adds diagnostic output rather than a bounded runtime improvement.

branch_triage.head: 3d49a30
branch_triage.reason: The relevant Qwen3.5 fixes target a divergent unified/vision_add_ons architecture and the full branch deletes the current local batched_vision prompt-cache stack and tests. Local qwen3_5.py already includes stored-position tail stitching, scalar/vector cache-offset handling, rope_deltas support, text-only original mlx-lm routing, and retained tests for chunked MRoPE and left-padded batch-cache behavior. A direct cherry-pick would be higher risk than benefit without new failing local evidence.

branch_triage.head: 366ebd4
interesting_commits: 366ebd4 Preserve backpressure in distributed stream bridge
4b6b826 Stop distributed stream when caller exits
d6656f1 Run sequential distributed MLX on model thread
branch_triage.reason: Distributed serving/runtime lane. It may be valuable for distributed correctness, but it is outside the current Mac-local retained direct benchmark promotion criteria.

branch_triage.head: c86c23a
interesting_commits: c86c23a Run Qwen VLM prompts on model thread
3e41fdf Run MLX VLM generation on model thread
c8275b6 Align distributed MLX prompt caching
branch_triage.reason: Distributed non-batched runtime branch with broad scheduler/threading changes. It is not a bounded Mac-local latency change and would require a separate distributed validation lane.

decision.live_lm_studio_reason: No candidate code change was selected; LM Studio VLM registration remains blocked by the M36 download/import/index orchestration issue.
decision.next_action: Keep the current runtime unchanged. Continue only with a new isolated local hypothesis or rerun LM Studio validation after the official LM Studio UI/CLI path registers LFM2.5-VL and lms ls --json exposes the model.
